# Skye Summit Homes by Dr. Jan Duffy
# Canonical guide for AI crawlers (AEO / GEO)

> Skye Summit is a 505-acre Olympia Companies master-planned community in northwest Las Vegas beyond the 215 Beltway near Red Rock Canyon, planned for about 3,500 homes. KB Home Vertice (299 homesites) may open sales early 2027; Woodside Homes is also planned. Dr. Jan Duffy, REALTOR® (Nevada license S.0197614.LLC) with Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties, is the buyer's representative for Skye Summit Homes.

Website: https://www.skyesummithomes.com/
Phone: (702) 930-8222
Email: DrJanSells@SkyeSummitHomes.com
Office: 11411 Southern Highlands Pkwy #300, Las Vegas, NV 89141

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/): Skye Summit Homes buyer representation
- [Skye Summit Master Plan](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/skye-summit-master-plan/): Pillar overview (505 acres, builders, timeline)
- [Skye Summit REALTOR®](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/skye-summit-realtor/): Realtor services
- [Buy](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/buy/): How to buy with a buyer's agent
- [New Construction](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/new-construction-skye-summit/): Builders & floor-plan pipeline
- [KB Home Vertice](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/kb-home-vertice-skye-summit/): First village (299 homesites)
- [Woodside Homes](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/woodside-homes-skye-summit/): Planned builder updates
- [Interest List](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/skye-summit-interest-list/): Early-access alerts
- [FAQ](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/skye-summit-faq/): Common buyer questions
- [Contact](https://www.skyesummithomes.com/contact/): Call / email / consult

## Entities

- Olympia Companies (developer)
- KB Home — Vertice at Skye Summit
- Woodside Homes (planned)
- Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area
- Centennial Hills, Las Vegas
- Clark County School District (CCSD)
- Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties
